26-27: $3.1M
27-28: $3.3M
28-29: $3.6M
$10M total

The Wolves project to be $12.7M under the second apron with five open roster spots (must fill four).

media.title: Heat extend two-way qualifying offer to Goldin, bypass similar move with Keels
media.description: The Miami Heat have created a pathway for former Florida Atlantic University center Vlad Goldin to return on a 2-way contract, while bypassing a similar opportunity with guard Trevor Keels.

items.title: With Isaiah Hartenstein back in the fold, the Thunder now project to be:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With Isaiah Hartenstein back in the fold, the Thunder now project to be:

🏀$10.2M over the tax
🏀$2.2M over the first apron
🏀$10.8M under the second apron

This is without Lu Dort or Kenrich Williams but does count both first-round draft picks.

items.title: NEW PODCAST:
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
NEW PODCAST:

It's another Sports Media Roundtable. Topics inc. Linda Cohn leaves ESPN after 34 years; Fox's World Cup and the NYT's story on Dianna Russini.

The guests are Jon Lewis, Armand Broady and Derek Futterman of @sportsmediawatch.bsky.social. 

TO LISTEN: swap.fm/l/4apy5A6Fma...
